raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch apſtulboja Ze-
dektius Azziſ/ un fehje to ar di-
wi Warra Schlehdehm winnu
uhs Babeli wedams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Kaldeeri fadedsna-
ja ta Kehnika Nammu/ un to
Lanschu Nammus ar Ugguni/
n nolaustja Jerusalemes Muh-
rus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tohs atliffufchus Lau-
dis/tas Pilsjahta bij atliffufchi/
un tohs Atkahpajus/ tas wiꞥ-
Raim bij peefrittufchi ar teem
zitteem Laudim/ tas atliffufchi
bija/ wedde NebufarAdans tas
Pils-Karra-Wihru Wirfneeks
uhs Babeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet no teem Laudim/
tas nabbagti btja/ tas wiﬀai
tuffscht bija/ atlizzinaja Nebufar
Adans tas Pils-Karra-Wthru
Wirfneeks eekſch tas Semmes
Juhda/ un dewe teem tai Deena
Wihna-Dahrsus un Tibrunus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet no Jeremijus bij
NebukadRezars tas Kehnisch
no Babeles pawehlejs zanr Ne-
bufarAdanu / to Pils-Karra-
Wihru Wirfneeku / nn fazzijs:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Xeimn wiann/ un luḥ-
fo labbi pehz winnu/ un ne dar-
ri winnam nekahdu Launu/ bet
ta wiach us tewim runnahs/
ta darr ar winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija NebufarA-
dans
tas Pils-Karra-Wthru
s/ un NebuSasbane
r-Junkuru Wirfneeks/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee nosfuhtija/ un jeh
Jeremiju no Zeetuma Pagal
ja/ un nodeue winnu Gad-
jum Aikama Dehtam/ ta De-
Sawana/ ta wiꞥſch to Nam-
wesu/ ta paliffe wiꞥſch ste-
teem Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta KUNga Wah-
bija notizzis uhs Jeremiju/
wiꞥſch wehl eelfch Zeetuma
galinja bija apturrechts/ un
zija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Etj/ un runna uhs Eb-
Meleku to Mohra Wihru /
takti: Ta fakka tas KUNG-
Zebnot/ tas Israeta Dee-
Reds/ es liifchu mannus Wa-
dus nahkt pahr scho Pillsa-
par Launu/ un ne par Lab-
un tee buhs tai Deena pree-
tawahin Azzin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tewi gribbu es
Deena isglahbt/ un tu ne ta-
nodohts teem Wihreem Roh-
kuru Preefscha tu bihstees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es teefcham isgla-
schu tewi/ un tu ne krittifi z
Soebinu/ un isneffifi ta-
Dwehseli fa Lanpijumu/ tap-
ka tu us mannim eſti pakahwo-
fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
